anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization, Huangbo or Chan no-seeking, Shinran radical Other Power, valid solitude, and unsafe community or authority.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Strongly lowers novelty and publishability. The idea should remain a merged support-routing heuristic unless split-source tests show the timing variable predicts held-out failures.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen and Huangbo may reject the before-after and support-inventory frame because practice is not a tool that leads to a separable result. Shinran may reject the practicer's calculation as self-power. Valid solitude shows that not every beginning requires visible social support, while unsafe community shows that support can be the danger rather than the cure.

claim_units: Support may precede a self-owned beginning rather than arrive after self-negation.
Support holders include teacher, vow, community, ritual form, present act, given trust, and bodily or practical conditions.
The better question is what was holding me before I tried to be the holder, not only what remains after me.
A timing distinction is proposed: support built by practice, revealed as already present, received from beyond private effort, or enacted as the present act.
The target wound is loneliness, feeling unneeded, and achievement-contingent self-worth that turns help into proof of self-sufficiency.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Therapy, recovery, coaching, education, and workplace onboarding.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs that explicitly distinguish built, revealed, received, and enacted supports will show different failure and repair patterns. For example, surrender-based programs will show pride-in-surrender failures, skill-building programs will show self-credit failures, and enacted-practice programs will show misunderstanding of the activity as a tool for a separable result.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A person beginning change may treat the help that made change possible as proof of private mastery unless the program names the prior or shared support and turns it into reciprocity rather than self-credit.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If failure patterns are predicted just as well by support quality, role clarity, socioeconomic stress, clinician or teacher skill, social network density, and participant mental health, then support timing is decorative.

exact_claim: Some self-emptying paths do not relocate support after the self is questioned, they reveal that the self was never the first support; teacher, vow, community, ritual, present act, or given trust may already carry the beginning, and the modern practice task is to receive help without converting it into private achievement.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders who see only entry or instruction passages can classify support as built, revealed, received, or enacted with acceptable inter-rater reliability, then predict held-out warning and repair language better than simpler variables such as social support quality, institution type, teacher contact, or religious coping style.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Support timing has independent predictive value.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source corpus test using SN 22.59, SN 45.2, Dogen Bendowa or Uji, Shinran Kyogyoshinsho and Tannisho, Huangbo, Dzogchen or Mahamudra, Christian grace, and one secular mindfulness corpus.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Low coder agreement, or no predictive gain beyond support quality, agency-style, teacher authority, social ecology, and clinical risk.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In screened lonely or achievement-driven adults, the practice reduces self-made pressure and increases concrete reciprocity or help-seeking more than ordinary journaling, rest, planning, or gratitude listing.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Already Helping List serves the target human wound.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week micro-pilot with pre and post measures for worth-pressure, loneliness, help-seeking, reciprocity acts, rumination, and safety signals.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: It increases shame, gratitude performance, passivity, dependency, unsafe contact, tool-performance anxiety, or performs no better than ordinary support prompts.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Soto, Chan, and direct-recognition practitioners reject carry-across-threshold language and identify failures in terms of misunderstanding practice, teacher relation, conduct, or stabilization rather than support moving before or after the self.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: No-gap traditions require a different coding rule.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Practitioner interviews and held-out manual warnings, coded before reading outcomes.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Teachers in these traditions routinely use support-timing language and report failures that match the codebook better than no-gap or practice-realization categories.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind readers can state that this record uniquely tests support timing, not merely support holder, continuity locus, or no one begins alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The model is distinguishable from recent internal records.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind distinct-content test with titles and agents removed.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Blind readers cannot distinguish it from No One Begins Alone or What Holds You That You Did Not Build without the title.

literature_search_queries: "support before the self" spiritual practice beginning
"No one begins alone" contemplative practice support
Clark Chalmers "The Extended Mind" reliable external resources
Joel Krueger "Extended Mind and Religious Cognition" ritual sacred space
Pargament religion problem solving self directing deferring collaborative
SN 45.2 admirable friendship whole holy life
Dogen Bendowa practice realization one authentic teacher trust
Shinran Other Power true entrusting nembutsu Primal Vow
social baseline theory social support risk effort Coan Beckes
Alcoholics Anonymous Twelve Steps higher power fellowship sponsor support

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate adds a cleaner phrase and the timing labels built, revealed, received, and enacted.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major internal downgrade. Treat as renamed unless blind readers can state a prediction not already present in the support-holder cluster.
near_neighbors.overlap: Extremely close. The same support-holder, pre-release continuity, no-gap boundary, self-worth, loneliness, and safety-screen structures are already present.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary records No One Begins Alone, What Holds You That You Did Not Build, Continuity Ecology Under Negation, Operational Remainder Ecology, Custody and Receiving Surface, and Some Help Should Not Be Managed

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies distributed support to self-emptying practice and to achievement-contingent self-sufficiency.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for the support ontology. Possible extension remains only in the support-timing failure test.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. External artifacts, bodies, language, culture, rituals, sacred spaces, songs, and other people can partly constitute cognition or religious cognition rather than merely assist it.
near_neighbors.source: Clark and Chalmers, The Extended Mind, https://consc.net/papers/extended.html, and Joel Krueger, Extended Mind and Religious Cognition, https://philarchive.org/rec/KRUTEM-2

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate broadens holders beyond God to teacher, vow, ritual, community, present act, body, and practical supports, then asks about timing before self-owned beginning.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade. The timing labels must predict more than agency-style variables to matter.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close on support and agency location. Self-directing, deferring, and collaborative styles already code whether problem-solving is carried by the self, God, or a shared relation.
near_neighbors.source: Pargament et al., Religion and the Problem-Solving Process: Three Styles of Coping, indexed at https://icmglt.org/icmlibrary/religion-and-the-problem-solving-process-three-styles-of-coping/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate generalizes friendship into a wider support-timing codebook and a modern self-worth practice.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong textual downgrade. The beginning-with-support insight is not new in early Buddhist terms.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close primary source. Admirable friendship is not an add-on to the path but central to cultivating the path.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate treats enacted present act as one support-timing category, but Dogen may refuse the entire support-before-support-after frame.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Useful as an anomaly and guardrail, not as confirmation of the model.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close and also anomalous. Practice-realization rejects a simple sequence where practice first builds support and result comes later.
near_neighbors.source: Dogen Bendowa and Soto practice-realization sources, https://www.lionsroar.com/just-wholeheartedly-sit/ and https://www.sotozen.com/eng/library/stories/vol01.html

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate translates received trust into a general lesson about help and self-sufficiency.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade and distortion risk. Shinran is not merely a generic support psychology source.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Shinran relocates efficacy to the Primal Vow, the Name, and Other Power rather than self-power calculation.
near_neighbors.source: Shinran, Kyogyoshinsho and Other Power materials, https://shinranworks.com/the-major-expositions/chapter-on-practice/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate extends this to spiritual beginning, vow, ritual, and practice-realization, and targets help-as-achievement conversion.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to strong downgrade for the human support mechanism.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Reliable others regulate exploration, stress, risk, effort, and available resources.
near_neighbors.source: Secure-base and social baseline theory, for example Social Baseline Theory: The Social Regulation of Risk and Effort, https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4375548/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate targets non-addiction high performers and asks whether help is converted into proof of self-sufficiency.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade for surrender, externalized support, and fellowship logic. Partial novelty remains only in the performance-identity timing test.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close practitioner near-neighbor. AA begins with unmanageability, higher power, another human being, inventory, amends, fellowship, and service.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Merge or cross-index with No One Begins Alone, What Holds You That You Did Not Build, Continuity Ecology Under Negation, Operational Remainder Ecology, Custody and Receiving Surface, Some Help Should Not Be Managed, and You Cannot Be Seeker, Path, and Prize.
Freeze new support-holder variants until a blind distinct-content test, one split-source support-timing corpus test, and one small Already Helping List pilot have run.

Build a bounded codebook with fields for support timing, support holder, support quality, agency history, unsafe authority, clinical exclusion, path grammar, no-gap status, reciprocity act, warning, repair, evidence passage, and confidence.
Use split-source testing. Do not let the same passage establish support timing and confirm the predicted warning or repair.
Close-read SN 45.2, SN 22.59, Dogen Bendowa or Uji, Shinran Kyogyoshinsho and Tannisho, Huangbo, one Dzogchen or Mahamudra source, and one Christian grace source before public wording.

Pilot Already Helping List only with screened stable adults. Exclude acute crisis, unsafe authority, abusive relationships, coercive groups, severe depression, psychosis, mania, dissociation, addiction withdrawal, OCD or scrupulosity, denied-agency wounds, and people whose main need is boundaries or clinical care.

Compare the practice against ordinary rest, social-support prompt, gratitude listing, planning prompt, asking for help, sponsorship or teacher check-in, and behavioral activation. Track shame, passivity, dependency, gratitude pressure, help-seeking, reciprocity, ordinary action, loneliness, and self-worth contingency.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.63 to 0.25. The idea mostly renames No One Begins Alone and What Holds You That You Did Not Build, with timing labels added. External sources also strongly anticipate distributed support, religious cognition, agency relocation, social support, recovery surrender, and practice-realization. Retain only as a support-timing test protocol if it shows predictive gain.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Originality falls if practitioners say this is standard kalyana mitta, grace, Other Power, social support, secure-base theory, recovery surrender, gratitude practice, or prior Lumenary support-holder language, with no new prediction from timing categories.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Contribution rises if practitioners can code support timing reliably, if timing predicts distinct failures or repairs beyond support quality and agency style, and if the practice reduces self-sufficiency pressure without increasing passivity or dependency.
questions: When students fail, does support timing matter, or is the real predictor support quality, teacher contact, social ecology, agency history, or clinical risk?
Does the phrase what was holding me before I tried to be the holder distort Dogen practice-realization, Shinran Other Power, or no-seeking traditions?
Can you name concrete cases where someone turned receiving help into private achievement, and what repair actually worked?
Would the Already Helping List change your recommendation, or would ordinary gratitude, asking for help, rest, therapy, sponsorship, or social contact do the same work?
What cases are harmed by prior-support language, especially denied-agency wounds, unsafe authority, coercion, passivity, or boundary failure?
relevant_practitioners: Soto Zen teachers and Dogen scholars
Christian grace theologians or spiritual directors
founder or high-performer coaches with clinical referral practices

primary_pair: Dogen Bendowa and Soto practice-realization sources, https://www.lionsroar.com/just-wholeheartedly-sit/ and https://www.sotozen.com/eng/library/stories/vol01.html, read against Shinran's Kyogyoshinsho, https://shinranworks.com/the-major-expositions/chapter-on-practice/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: Very high. This is extremely close to No One Begins Alone and What Holds You That You Did Not Build, and externally anticipated by extended mind, religious cognition, secure-base theory, social baseline theory, religious coping, AA, spiritual direction, community formation, grace theology, and practice-realization scholarship. Human-condition fit is direct but narrow: lonely and achievement-trained adults who over-own success or convert help into private proof. It is not for acute crisis, unsafe authority, abusive relationships, coercive groups, severe depression, psychosis, mania, dissociation, addiction withdrawal, denied-agency wounds, people needing boundaries, or compulsive self-monitors who turn the support list into another worth test.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before any public claim, read internal Lumenary records No One Begins Alone and What Holds You That You Did Not Build; Clark and Chalmers on extended mind, https://consc.net/papers/extended.html; Joel Krueger on extended religious cognition, https://philarchive.org/rec/KRUTEM-2; Pargament on religious problem-solving styles; Talal Asad on discursive tradition; Lindbeck on doctrine as grammar; secure-base and social baseline theory; AA Twelve Steps, https://www.aa.org/the-twelve-steps; Dogen scholarship on shusho-itto; Shinran scholarship on hakarai and Other Power; Huangbo and Chan no-seeking sources; and loneliness, burnout, and perfectionism sources.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: SN 22.59 removes ownership from the aggregates, but SN 45.2 already makes admirable friendship central to path cultivation, which makes no one begins alone textually old. Dogen's Bendowa does not simply say support came before the self; it says practice and realization are not two separable items, while still preserving master, transmission, trust, and authentic teacher. Shinran places practice and shinjin under Amida's Vow and Other Power, so translating this into generic prior support risks turning a theological grammar into a self-help support inventory. The support-timing labels are operationally useful, but the claim is mostly a recoding of existing support, grace, transmission, and community structures.

title: The Road Starts Before You
unlike_statement: Unlike No One Begins Alone, What Holds You That You Did Not Build, extended mind, religious cognition, Pargament, secure-base theory, AA, Dogen, and Shinran, this idea's only separable contribution is a support-timing codebook: code whether support is built, revealed, received, or enacted before reading warnings, then test whether timing predicts failure modes such as pride in surrender, passivity, isolation, or converting help into achievement better than support-locus and social-support baselines.
